items.title: Palestinians say new Israeli measures in West Bank amount to de facto annexation
items.description: The measures aim to increase Israeli control over the occupied West Bank in terms of property law, planning, licensing and enforcement.

items.title: Streeting's Mandelson messages reveal election fears and criticism of government
items.description: The health secretary says he is publishing the messages "after a weekend of smear and innuendo that I have something to hide".

items.title: 'Didn't want the season to end like this' - Grealish has surgery
items.description: Jack Grealish says he "didn't want the season to end like this" after confirming he has had surgery on a foot stress fracture.

items.title: Family of Hillsborough victims criticise 'hollow' police apology
items.description: Trevor and Jenni Hicks, whose daughters died at Hillsborough, want court records to be corrected.

items.title: King's 'profound concern' at Andrew claims as Palace says it is 'ready' to support police
items.description: Making his first intervention in the Epstein scandal, the King said he is ready to support the police in their inquiries.
